name: compareModes

input.claim: Privacy is a precondition for free thought.
Privacy is a precondition for free thought.
Privacy is a precondition for free thought.

_note: Runs one prompt through two distinct HLR reasoning modes via the real in-process HLR engine (lazy-imported, no network/LLM in the default path). Empty input fails-closed with 'claim_or_question_required'; same/invalid modes are rejected; 'depth' is a fail-CLOSED numeric guard (poisoned → ok:false invalid_depth, never a clamped ok:true). If the HLR engine is not loadable it returns ok:false hlr_engine_unavailable — never a fabricated success. No DB; runs for the assassin's internal owner actor.
